sourceRef.citation: Maldonado Saavedra, Luis, Fernando et al. 2026

statement.en: Sensitivity Analysis of a RFRFR Continuum Parallel Robot

proposer: Maldonado Saavedra, Luis, Fernando, Quentin Peyron, Sébastien Briot et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a technical research paper (preprint, dated 2026-04-25) presenting sensitivity analysis methods for a specialized robotic system. The axiom is not yet validated through peer review, experimental confirmation, or independent replication. The claim is provisional and subject to refinement.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 並列ロボットの感度は、剛性の行列式と駆動空間の競合が、時間スケールで減衰する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 6軸の並列脚が中心の感度点から放射状に広がり、剛性と柔軟性の緊張関係を映す。
